description: This module turns a TXT file into an ODF file which can be used with other GenePattern Modules.
author: Edwin Juarez;GenePattern - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## txt2odf GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
txt2odf is a GenePattern module that This module turns a TXT file into an ODF file which can be used with other GenePattern Modules.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: txt_file, prune_gct
- Optional: gct, cls

### 3. Command Line
```
<python_3.6> <libdir>txt2odf.py <txt_file> <prune_gct> <gct> <cls>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-python36\:0.5

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: txt_file
parameters.description: The text file to be reformatted.

parameters.name: prune_gct
parameters.description: Whether or not to prune the GCT file to match the TXT file.

parameters.name: gct
parameters.description: This is the GCT file which was originally used. *Set prune_gct to True if you want this file pruned*

parameters.name: cls
parameters.description: This is the CLS file which was originally used.
